betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Tomb Many Graves§f

§aDeath is not the end of your hard-earned items!§f
When you perish in this dangerous world, §9Tomb Many Graves§f creates a secure grave block at your death site, safely preserving your inventory until you can return for it.

§6Grave Mechanics§f:
§b• Retrieve Items by Sneaking§f: To open your grave and retrieve your items, you must §cshift (sneak) while standing on the grave block§f.
§b• Anti-Grave Robbing§f: Your grave is locked specifically to you. Other players §ccannot rob or access your grave§f, ensuring your gear is §a100% secure§f.
§b• Death Inventory List§f: Upon respawning, you are given a §eDeath Inventory List§f. §9Right-click§f or hold it to spawn a §aparticle trail§f leading you directly back to your grave coordinates.
§b• Inventory Slot Priority§f: When you reclaim your grave, items will return to their exact original slots. If a slot is occupied, the grave items take priority and the occupied items are safely dropped on the ground.
§b• Custom Aesthetic§f: A custom model of your §aplayer's own head§f will render on top of your grave.

§cNote§f: The grave block will search a radius of §e9 blocks§f around your death location to find a safe block to spawn.
